personal.bio: I'm a Computer Science student at UPC passionate about building high-quality digital products. I specialize in Full Stack development and IT systems, always striving to write clean, scalable code with great UX.
personal.bio2: I'm passionate about building products that combine a thoughtful user experience with clean, maintainable code. Always looking to learn new technologies and apply best practices in every project.

items.title: OneMore
items.description: Full stack application with a React frontend and Python/FastAPI backend.
items.longDescription: OneMore is a full stack web application. The frontend is built with React + Vite and Tailwind CSS, and the backend with Python, FastAPI and PostgreSQL, all containerized with Docker.

items.title: DockerIptables
items.description: Solution for managing iptables rules in Docker environments securely and configurably.
items.longDescription: IT/DevOps tool that solves the issue of Docker containers bypassing firewall rules by directly manipulating iptables. Provides configurable scripts to manage the DOCKER-USER chain and ensure consistent network control.

items.title: Web Certificates Checker
items.description: Python script to verify SSL/TLS certificates of multiple hosts and export results.
items.longDescription: Python program that checks SSL/TLS certificates for multiple hosts at once or a specific one. Supports custom ports, saves errors to misses.txt and exports certificate data to Excel.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.description: Full stack development in a professional technology consulting environment.

items.title: IT Intern
items.description: Technical support and systems maintenance for students, professors and administrative staff. Resolved software, hardware and network incidents, managed systems and configured local networks.

items.title: Sales Associate
items.description: Personalized customer advisory on sporting goods, stock management and restocking during peak demand, collaborating in a team to meet sales targets.

items.title: BSc in Computer Science
items.description: Specialization in Software Engineering and distributed systems.

items.title: Technology Baccalaureate
items.description: Technology track with emphasis on mathematics, physics and technology.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm open to new opportunities, freelance projects or just a chat about technology. Feel free to reach out.
